BLUE N WATER official website. BNW develops RaDX catalyst-based water treatment, AQUACOM platform systems, BLUE BOX mobile water treatment, food-processing water reuse, industrial wastewater pretreatment, and resource-circulation solutions. Contact: bluenwaterceo@bluenwater.com. PMO: 187 Wonhyo-ro, 5F, Yongsan-gu, Seoul 04364, Republic of Korea.
